channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Nikola Jokic makes NBA history with 30-20-20 triple-double in Nuggets' OT win over Suns
item.description: Nikola Jokic sat in front of his locker, calmly scrolling through his phone, seemingly unimpressed that 30 minutes earlier he made NBA history.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kelly, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: De'Aaron Fox struggles in his 1st game in Sacramento since he was traded to the Spurs
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — De'Aaron Fox spent much of his time in Sacramento as the fan favorite and face of the Kings franchise who helped end a record-long playoff drought and brought much-needed joy to what had been a downtrodden team.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Nikola Jokic has 31 points, 22 assists and 21 rebounds in Nuggets' 149-141 OT win over Suns
item.description: Nikola Jokic had 31 points, 21 rebounds and a career-high 22 assists and the Denver Nuggets outlasted the Phoenix Suns 149-141 in overtime Friday night after losing a 21-point lead.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kelly, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Colorado Mesa defeats Black Hills State advances to RMAC Championship
item.description: The Colorado Mesa Mavericks defeated the Black Hills State Yellow Jackets 68-54 in a dominant performance, advancing to the RMAC championship.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: A's announce 3-year Las Vegas sponsorship as club looks toward future move
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Athletics will play in Northern California for at least the next three seasons, but will also represent their future home in Las Vegas and brought four of their star players to drive home that point.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NBA-leading Cavaliers win 13th straight game, rallying to edge Hornets 118-117
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 24 points and the NBA-leading Cleveland Cavaliers rallied for their 13th straight victory, 118-117 over the Charlotte Hornets on Friday night. Darius Garland added 20 points to help the Cavaliers improve to 53-10.
item.dc:creator: RICHARD WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charles Barkley calls Canadians 'fools' for breaking Wayne Gretzky's heart over Trump friendship
item.description: Charles Barkley took aim at Canadians who have been critical of NHL legend Wayne Gretzky over his friendship with President Donald Trump, calling them fools.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rantanen dealt to Dallas, lands 8-year contract; Panthers add Marchand at NHL trade deadline
item.description: Mikko Rantanen went back West — but with the Dallas Stars this time following a brief stint in Carolina. And Bruins captain Brad Marchand is leaving Boston after 16 seasons to join the defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Browns owner Jimmy Haslam declines to meet with Myles Garrett as tensions rise following trade request: report
item.description: Cleveland Browns principal owner Jimmy Haslam decided against meeting with the team's star defensive player Myles Garrett amid a trade request, NFL Network reported, citing sources.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shane Lowry likes it tough and builds a 2-shot lead at Bay Hill
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Shane Lowry loves the grind of a strong test and it's showing at Bay Hill. He had six birdies Friday in slightly tamer conditions for a 5-under 67, giving him a two-shot lead going into the weekend at the Arnold Palmer Invitational. It wasn't as cold as the day before.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dion Dawkins: Bills 'would've put on a better show' than Chiefs in Super Bowl
item.description: After watching how the Chiefs fared in last month's Super Bowl, Bills tackle Dion Dawkins said his team would've had a "better chance" at beating the Eagles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida Panthers add veteran Brad Marchand as they gear up for run at another Stanley Cup title
item.description: The Florida Panthers welcomed the arrival of Boston Bruins captain Brad Marchand in a Friday trade that adds even more grit and experience to the Stanley Cup champions’ roster.
item.dc:creator: Alanis Thames, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Raiders land Geno Smith in blockbuster trade with Seahawks: reports
item.description: In a blockbuster trade, the Seattle Seahawks dealt veteran QB Geno Smith to the Las Vegas Raiders, and he'll reunite with head coach Pete Carroll.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Washington Commanders release defensive tackle Jonathan Allen
item.description: Six weeks after their playoff run ended with a loss to eventual Super Bowl-champion Philadelphia, the Washington Commanders parted ways with one of their defensive leaders and brought back another.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Condon's 'wheeling and dealing' has No. 5 Florida closing in on a No. 1 seed in March Madness
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — It wasn’t long ago that Alex Condon was a point guard. Although he was admittedly “pretty uncoordinated” as a teenager playing low-level basketball in Australia, Condon quickly learned how to handle the rock.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Green Day's Billie Joe Armstrong, rapper Too Short join Oakland Ballers' ownership group
item.description: (KRON) -- East Bay rap icon Too Short and Green Day frontman Billie Joe Armstrong are getting behind the Oakland Ballers. The team announced on Wednesday that the two internationally renowned musicians -- both of whom have East Bay roots -- will be joining the team's ownership group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 28 and NBA-best Cavs beat Bulls 139-117 for 11th straight win
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 28 points, Jarrett Allen added 25 points and 17 rebounds, and the NBA-best Cleveland Cavaliers won their 11th straight game, 139-117 over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Soccer CIFSDS Open Division Championship: San Marcos 2, Bonita Vista 1
item.description: The CIFSDS Open Division Girls Soccer Championship was held at Mission Bay High School between the San Marcos Knights (17-4-3) and the Bonita Vista Barons (12-5-2).
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Soccer CIF Division III Final: San Diego 2, Mira Mesa 1
item.description: As the 7 seeded San Diego High School Cavers, are your 2025 CIFSDS Division III Champions, the final score 2-1
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC makes its home debut before a sellout crowd in a city hungry for top-level soccer
item.description: A match decades in the making finally happens Saturday night when San Diego FC debuts on its home field in front of a sellout crowd of fans starved for elite professional sports — and particularly hungry for top-level soccer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Florida Panthers acquire D Seth Jones in a trade with the Chicago Blackhawks
item.description: The defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers acquired defenseman Seth Jones in a trade with the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 4 Houston clinches Big 12 regular-season title with 73-64 win over Cincinnati
item.description: L.J. Cryer scored 20 points and No. 4 Houston clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title for a second straight season with a 73-64 win over Cincinnati on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation
